title: Reclaim Fund Ltd Annual Report and Accounts 2024/25
body: "The 2024/25 Annual Report and Accounts (ARA) highlights the performance of the business over the 12-month accounting period, containing key highlights and analysis, alongside detailed Corporate Governance disclosures.  The ARA includes key clauses from the Framework Document between HMT and RFL, and highlights the wider ecosystem of Dormant Assets, in particular demonstrating the journey of a Dormant Asset from the point at which it is legally dormant and is voluntarily paid to RFL from financial institutions, through to how it can be reclaimed, and how any agreed surplus is passed onto good causes.  The document references scheme expansion including the involvement of the industry champions alongside other stakeholders including government and regulators, and also showcases some of the good causes that benefit from the Scheme. "
